items.name_en: Hammock bag 20CM new size 🎁 Hammock bag crazy flip! So beautiful 🌹 This is a size between small and mini, more suitable for Asian girls. The fashion world's 'Transformer' 🌻 can change into six different forms. The novel and versatile Hammock bag design can change into six different forms 💋 meeting different usage habits and matching needs. Adjust its shape according to how much you need to carry 💄 Large capacity, shoulder, crossbody, handbag, N ways to carry 👜 The proportions on the body are just right. Multi-purpose, all-powerful 👑 Whether it is glossy plain weave or full and soft grained cowhide, it looks very high-end 🎒 Even more deadly, every color is well matched, super suitable for street snaps 💥 Great for posing and also very spacious, instantly capturing you 🔥 Size: 20CM~19CM~14CM
